text.title: Solution Assessment Types and Process
text.summary: Four assessment types, five success criteria categories, five-step process, and assessment timing triggers.

rule.statement: Run four assessment types at distinct points: Design Assessment (during design — validate proposed solution meets requirements before build), Implementation Assessment (during build — verify correct implementation against spec), Deployment Assessment (at go-live — confirm readiness: QA, ops, support, training, security), Post-Implementation Assessment (after deployment at 30/60/90 days — measure actual delivered value).
rule.rationale: A single end-of-project assessment misses implementation errors that could be fixed cheaply during build and cannot baseline-compare value because no pre-launch measurement was taken.

list.item: Business Value: ROI achieved, revenue increased, cost reduced — measured against original business case projections
Functional: features work as specified in requirements — measured against requirements compliance table
Performance: speed, reliability, scalability — measured against NFR thresholds defined in requirements
Usability: user satisfaction score, adoption rate — measured via survey and analytics
Compliance: regulatory requirements met — measured via audit findings and control effectiveness

rule.statement: Step 1 — define assessment criteria and lock metric definitions with baseline queries. Step 2 — assess against requirements (compare actual to expected per requirement). Step 3 — evaluate business value (measure actuals against targets). Step 4 — identify limitations (document gaps and their business impact). Step 5 — recommend: accept, accept with remediation plan, require additional changes, or reject.
rule.rationale: Steps without a defined order produce incomplete assessments; skipping step 1 (locking baselines) invalidates step 3 (value measurement).

list.item: Sprint complete → Implementation check (sample requirements verified)
30 days post go-live → Initial post-implementation assessment
90 days post go-live → Full post-implementation assessment
Annually → Ongoing value assessment (contract renewal, phase-gate)
